review_title: Great drinks but setup was confusing
review_text: The drink quality is excellent, but the first setup flow took three tries. The app kept asking me to pair again even after the machine showed connected.
I can blend manually, but the app drops the blender every other day. Re-pairing fixes it for a while and then it disappears again.
The vacuum cleaned fine before the latest update. Now room mapping resets and the robot starts the whole house instead of the selected room.
Love the grill, but the probe said chicken was done when it was clearly not. That is a safety concern, not just an inconvenience.
The SharkClean app signs me out and then loops at login. I cannot start the vacuum from work anymore.
After two months the basket coating started flaking despite hand washing. Food sticks and I am worried about using it.
The Creami is loud, which I expected. The bigger issue is the lid sensor sometimes says open when it is fully locked.
My schedule vanished after the app update. The robot still works from the button, but the smart features are basically gone.
The styling results are good, but one attachment gets extremely hot near the handle. I stopped using it because it felt unsafe.
I charged it fully and left it in a cabinet for a week. It was dead when I went to use it, which defeats the portable idea.
The app and machine both say the pod is missing. I tried three pods from the same box and only one registered.
Suction is great, but boost mode gives me maybe eight minutes. The battery estimate also jumps from 40 percent to empty.

review_title: Support asked for logs I cannot find
review_text: Support told me to send app logs, but the instructions do not match the current app screens. I gave up and returned it.
Coffee tastes good but water pools under the machine during brew. It happened twice on a wood counter.

review_title: Obstacle avoidance is worse at night
review_text: During the day it is fine, but at night it bumps chair legs and misses the kitchen. It feels like the sensor behavior changed.
The cooker works, but steam gets behind the display window. I am worried it will fail after the warranty.
Changing my Wi-Fi name turned into a full reset. The app never explained that I needed to delete the old robot first.
Pellets work well when they feed, but the smoke box jams and the grill throws an error. Cleaning it did not solve it.
Recipes look nice but sync takes forever and sometimes the blender starts with the wrong preset name in the app.
The app said the filter was nearly done after three weeks in a clean apartment. Customer support said to reset it manually.
The espresso is great, but the milk tube clogs unless I clean it immediately. The quick-start guide does not make that obvious.
The app crashes every time I tap add appliance. I can use the product, but I cannot access guided recipes or warranty setup.
It cleans well, but the dirty tank smells after one day even when emptied. The gasket area seems to hold liquid.
The grill itself is excellent, but the probe cable started fraying near the plug after six cooks.
I get stuck brush notifications two hours after the robot stops. By then the cleaning job is useless.

review_title: Great product but error codes unclear
review_text: We love the drinks, but E2 appeared twice and the manual did not say what to do besides unplugging it.
It pulls up pet hair, but the brush roll wraps hair after one room. The cleanout door is harder to open than advertised.
Firmware update sat at 92 percent for an hour and then the robot stayed offline. Support had me reboot everything twice.
